briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby's 2025 Bylaw Tracking Index — Key Decisions Still In Progress
briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on several bylaws still marked 'In Progress', including major zoning changes, a new Official Community Plan, and housing agreements. These proposals cover new residential towers, mixed-use developments, and updated rules for liquor and cannabis store locations across Burnaby.
briefs.action_required: Review bylaws affecting your industry — especially zoning, liquor/cannabis distance rules, and housing agreements — before upcoming council votes.
